site.title: AKS Wear – Premium Football Jerseys | Wear the Game
site.description: AKS Wear – Premium football jerseys from top clubs and national teams. Authentic kits delivered to your door. No online payment required.

promo.orderPhone: Order by Phone — No Online Payment

hero.subtitle: Authentic jerseys from the world's greatest clubs and national teams. Confirmed by phone — no online payment needed.

fastDispatch.title: Fast Dispatch
fastDispatch.desc: Same-day dispatch on orders placed before 2pm on business days.

authentic.title: 100% Authentic
authentic.desc: Every jersey is officially licensed — never a replica.

phoneConfirm.title: Phone Confirmation
phoneConfirm.desc: We call you personally to confirm your order before shipping.

returns.title: Easy Returns
returns.desc: Changed your mind? No problem — 30-day hassle-free returns.

testimonials.label: Customer Reviews
testimonials.t1: The quality is outstanding. The Argentina World Cup kit arrived in perfect condition, exactly as described.
testimonials.t2: Super fast delivery and a phone call to confirm my order — love the personal touch. Will order again!
testimonials.t3: Best retro kit store online. Got the AC Milan 2003 jersey and it looks incredible. 10/10.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.subtitle: Complete your order
checkout.name: Full Name
checkout.paymentNote: We will call you to confirm your order and arrange payment upon delivery.

footer.about: Your premium destination for authentic football kits, retro classics, and national team jerseys.
footer.newsletterText: Subscribe to receive updates, access to exclusive deals, and more.
